config.handybookshelves.title: Handy Bookshelves Settings
config.handybookshelves.enableGlint.desc: Show an enchantment shimmer on chiseled bookshelf slots that contain enchanted books.
config.handybookshelves.enableNameTags.d: Show the enchantment name above a bookshelf slot when you aim at it.
config.handybookshelves.nameTagRange.des: How close you need to be (in blocks) for enchantment name tags to appear.
config.handybookshelves.nameTagScale.des: Size of the enchantment name tag text. 100% is vanilla name tag size.
